creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
The error:
make[4]: "/usr/src/stand/kboot/Makefile" line 27: Cannot open /usr/src/stand/kboot/arch/powerpc/Makefile.inc

Building only works after retrying with -DNO_CLEAN.
This error only affects powerpc64.

# first bad commit: [6497250f6f7f93e36795f5d0ec8ac658f6e781d8] kboot: Split out powerpc build
